name: Sweet Corn & Poblano Chowder
headline: with Old Bay Toast
description: We couldn’t be prouda of this chowda! This creamy soup has all the veggies worth boasting about, like corn, poblano pepper, and tender Yukon gold potatoes. Cream cheese and melty cheddar are swirled in for extra richness, then, it’s all dolloped with sour cream. On the side, there’s toasted baguette slathered with an Old Bay compound butter so you can sop up every last drop.
